questions.prompt: Which of these stay with the MSP even when the customer subscribes to Cyber Hero? (Select all that apply.)
choices: Incident triage when a request looks like a real attack
Decisions about adding new applications to the customer's standard allowlist
questions.explanation: Cyber Hero handles routine transactional approvals. Everything that requires customer-specific knowledge, policy design judgement, or incident-response context stays with the MSP.
